li.p: Special characters used by XML, character escaping: <>&'";
Special characters used by LaTeX, where LaTeX \text and MathJax \text disagree: #%&<>\^_`|~
Special characters used by LaTeX, where LaTeX \text and MathJax \text can agree: ${}

statement.p: In answers, because of and MathJax divergence, the first two should come out in verbatim. (And so should any string containing even one of those characters.) The latter three should come out in regular text.
